name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: King Adult Dog Food Canned Beef 415g
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural wet dog food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs.
description: King Adult Dog Food Canned - Beef , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ......................................6.5% Fat ..................................................3.5% Crude Ash ......................................... 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .......................0.3% Moisture.............................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
